title: narcissus cuatrecasasii subsp. arundanus
intro: Narcissus cuatrecasasii subsp. arundanus, a type of flowering bulbous plant, is a subspecies of the Narcissus cuatrecasasii species, native to Ecuador. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Narcissus cuatrecasii subsp. arundanus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and protect against infections, as well as its potential to have antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the bulbs or flowers, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
